summary: Tron Light Cycle Background Effects Testing - 11 frontend tests + 6 backend tests all PASSED. TronBackground component renders correctly on Landing Page, Auth Page, and Unified Dashboard with dual color scheme (blue for players, red for GMs).

breakdown.tron-background-effects.spec.ts (fronten: 11/11 passed - Tron effects on Landing, Auth, Dashboard, mobile toggle, navigation
breakdown.test_npc_quick_reference.py (backend): 6/6 passed - NPCs CRUD, Locations, Campaigns, Characters APIs

context_for_next_testing_agent: TronBackground component tested on 6 pages: LandingPage (variant='landing'), AuthPage (variant='both'), UnifiedDashboard (variant='blue' for player section, variant='red' for GM section), CharacterSheetFull (variant='blue'), CampaignDashboard (variant='red'), GMScreen (variant='red'). The CSS animations for light trails are in App.css (lines 1014-1270). Key verified features: 1) .tron-effects-container has pointer-events: none and z-index: 0 so UI elements remain interactive, 2) .light-trail-blue animates left-to-right, .light-trail-red animates right-to-left, 3) Mobile toggle works correctly showing PLAYER HUB and GM SIDE buttons on <768px viewport, 4) Login/logout flow works correctly with Tron effects.

features: Blue and red light trails both visible
Get Started button clickable despite effects layer
Dual TronBackground - blue player side, red GM side
Player section has 'PLAYER SIDE' header with cyan styling
GM section has 'GM SIDE' header with red styling
Dashboard buttons clickable (NEW CHARACTER, NEW CAMPAIGN, Review, Referral)
PLAYER HUB and GM SIDE toggle buttons work
View switching between player and GM sections
Navigation between pages preserves Tron effects
Logout redirects to auth page with Tron effects
